src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/Applic.general_idea: Update the import statement for EntityScan to reflect its relocation in Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/Applic.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.orm.jpa.EntityScan was removed in Spring Boot 2.0; using the old import causes a compilation error (package/class not found).

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x embedded servlet API with Spring Boot 2.x standard servlet API.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.context.embedded.FilterRegistrationBean was removed in Spring Boot 2.0; code fails to compile without switching to org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.FilterRegistrationBean.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Update FilterRegistrationBean bean definition to use generic type parameter required by Spring Boot 2.x.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x FilterRegistrationBean is generic; omitting the type parameter or using the old non-generic constructor style may cause compilation errors or deprecation warnings depending on strictness, but primarily the class signature changed.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.before: public FilterRegistrationBean corsFilter() { FilterRegistrationBean filter = new FilterRegistrationBean();
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.after: public FilterRegistrationBean<CorsFilter> corsFilterRegistration() { FilterRegistrationBean<CorsFilter> filter = new FilterRegistrationBean<>();

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove inheritance from deprecated WebMvcConfigurerAdapter.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: WebMvcConfigurerAdapter was deprecated in Spring Framework 5.0 and removed in 5.3; extending it causes compilation failure in newer Spring versions compatible with Java 11/Spring Boot 2.x.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove addResourceHandlers method as WebMvcConfigurerAdapter is no longer extended.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: The method addResourceHandlers is an @Override for WebMvcConfigurerAdapter. Without the inheritance, this method is orphaned and likely causes compilation errors if it retains the @Override annotation or if the interface contract is no longer satisfied.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove addViewControllers method as WebMvcConfigurerAdapter is no longer extended.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: The method addViewControllers is an @Override for WebMvcConfigurerAdapter. Without the inheritance, this method is orphaned and causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the removed WebMvcConfigurerAdapter methods.
src/main/java/ch/rasc/eds/starter/config.why_exists: Imports for ResourceHandlerRegistry, ViewControllerRegistry, and WebMvcConfigurerAdapter are no longer used after removing the corresponding methods and inheritance, causing 'unused import' compilation warnings or errors in strict builds.
